### рџЏ·пёЏ Type of Change


| Type           | Description                            |
| -------------- | -------------------------------------- |
| [ ] `feat`     | New feature                            |
| [ ] `fix`      | Bug fix                                |
| [ ] `refactor` | Code restructure, no functional change |
| [ ] `perf`     | Performance improvement                |
| [ ] `test`     | Tests only                             |
| [ ] `docs`     | Documentation only                     |
| [ ] `chore`    | Config, CI/CD, dependencies            |

### вњ… Checklist

- [ ] Follows project conventions (`AGENTS.md`)
- [ ] Self-reviewed
- [ ] Tests added/updated вЂ” `poetry run pytest -q` passes
- [ ] Lint вЂ” `poetry run ruff check .` and `poetry run ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] Types вЂ” `poetry run mypy` passes
- [ ] No secrets committed; new env vars added to `.env.example`
- [ ] OpenAPI / `README.md` updated if user-facing API or setup changed
